rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal For Delay In Prcsecution; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred 10162018 To 03062019 For Enforcement Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees As Costs Incurred 10162018 To 03062019 For Enforcement Of Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to recovery of post-judgment enforcement fees. The hours spent and hourly rates are reasonable. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Judgment Debtor Anne Kihagis Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And Or Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT ZORIALL LLC, ANNE KIHAGI Judgment Debtor Anne Kihagis Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax And Or Strike Costs is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Strike is DENIED. Costs Bill was submitted for filing on October 16, 2020. The delay in processing of the e-filing is not grounds for motion to strike. Motion to Tax is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show that any part of a lump sum of $1,513 for "filing/serve/CC/courier" is recoverable under Costs Bill and failed to seek these costs by a separate motion. See Notice of Motion filed on October 16, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion For Leave To Sue Receiver In An Independent Action In Los Angeles County
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, CHRISTINE MWANGI Defendants Notice Of Motion For Leave To Sue Receiver In An Independent Action In Los Angeles County is continued to February 8, 2021 to be hearing with other pending motions. By no later than January 19, 2020 moving party to re-file its Points and Authorities under appropriate caption. See December 22, 2020 e-filing rejection re: December 21, 2020 filing submission. The changes to be made solely to the caption page. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ELAINE DOWELL VS. KORENE TOM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 15, 2020 line 8. is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith (1) facts establishing that CC 47(b) privilege does not bar Plaintiff's causes of action, except malicious prosecution; and (2) facts showing that the underlying action ended in Plaintiff's favor within the meaning of malicious prosecution cause of action. =(501/CFH)
